summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Dhampur Green HORECA Lead Intelligence app. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows tested and working including Dashboard, Lead Discovery, Lead Database, Lead Detail, and Outreach Center.

issues: Donut chart renders but is slightly small/truncated in the right panel; legend shows 6 segments which is fine but chart visual area could be larger
Duplicate leads visible in table (e.g. Grand Hyatt Mumbai, Kailash Parbat Mithai appear twice) - due to bulk-create from testing + original seed data. Not a bug but may be worth noting.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 673 lines - manageable but consider splitting routes into separate modules if app grows
No pagination shown in Lead Database UI (loads up to 100 leads by default) - could cause performance issues at scale
Seed data check uses count > 0 which means re-seeding is impossible if you want fresh data; consider a force flag
seed_data_creation: TEST_Lead Automation and 2 bulk-created leads added during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major flows verified. Backend 16/16 passing. Dashboard KPIs, charts, Lead Discovery (3 tabs), Lead Database (search+filters), Lead Detail (AI score gauge, re-qualify, generate email), Outreach Center (lead selection, email generation, copy, email history) all working. AI features (qualify + generate email) working with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. MOCKED: /api/leads/discover returns simulated results. Note: test run added a few test leads to the database (TEST_ prefixed).
